_comment: Two independently-installable webpieces PreToolUse hooks. The Rules hook validates code-style on Write/Edit/MultiEdit; the Guards hook protects git/PR/branch — it matches Write|Edit|MultiEdit|Bash so ALL guards run here (bash git/PR guards on Bash, file guards like feature-branch-guard on Write/Edit). Install them with `wp-setup-ai-hooks` (which lets you pick a location per hook); this file just shows the wiring. Project installs point at a checked-in shim `./.claude/webpieces/ai-hook.sh <bin>` (generated by the installer, committed on purpose) so a missing bin — fresh clone before `pnpm install`, or the package removed — prints a friendly 'run pnpm install' line instead of a raw `sh: No such file or directory` on every tool call. A global ~/.claude/settings.json install instead uses the absolute `node <repoRoot>/node_modules/.bin/<bin>`.
